veinminerplusplus.name: Veinminer++
veinminerplusplus.config.title: Veinminer++ Settings
veinminerplusplus.config.veinMax.tooltip: Maximum blocks broken in one Vein action — the everyday mode. Kept small so casual vein-mining stays bounded (1–128).
veinminerplusplus.config.spreadMax.toolt: Maximum blocks broken in one Spread action — the larger, opt-in mode (1–1024).
veinminerplusplus.config.treeMax.tooltip: Maximum logs felled from one tree — large enough for tall 2x2 giant trees (1–512).
veinminerplusplus.config.blocksPerTick.t: How many blocks are broken per server tick while draining the queue. Higher = faster, heavier on the server (1–64).
veinminerplusplus.config.durabilityPerce: Durability cost per block as a percentage of vanilla: 100 = normal, 0 = free, 150 = 50% more. Unbreaking still applies on top (0–150).
veinminerplusplus.config.smartTrees.tool: When on, breaking a log only fells the tree if leaves are attached to its logs — so log and wood-block houses are left intact. Turn off to fell any connected logs.
veinminerplusplus.config.clearLeaves.too: When on, felling an isolated tree also clears its leaf canopy, dropping the same loot (saplings, sticks, apples) leaves give when they decay. Trees whose leaves are shared with a neighbour are left to decay normally.
veinminerplusplus.config.requireTool.too: When on, soft blocks (grass, dirt, sand) still need a tool in hand to vein-mine. When off, they can be vein-mined by hand or any item — handy early game or to save durability. Hard blocks always need the correct tool.
veinminerplusplus.config.enableSpread.to: When on, the larger Spread mode is added to the [ / ] cycle. Spread follows connected matching blocks like Vein but up to the (bigger) Spread cap.
veinminerplusplus.config.enableExtraShap: When on, the larger box shapes (5x5x5 and 9x9x3) are added to the [ / ] cycle. Each breaks its full volume, oriented along your look direction, and is staggered over a few ticks.
veinminerplusplus.config.alwaysShowGuide: When on, the 3x3x3 edge guide is rendered continuously while sneaking, not just briefly after cycling shapes.
